core_principles: Motion-heavy but performant (data-viz animations, scroll reveals)
Strict dark mode with stark cyan accents
design_philosophy.surface_strategy: Grid Borders & Retro-Futurism (visible skeleton, sharp edges, no rounded corners, terminal-inspired inputs and text elements)

heading_font.usage_rules: Display sans for all major headers. Tight tracking (tracking-tighter) for everything over 32px.

body_font.usage_rules: Clean legibility for small explanatory text.

mono_font.usage_rules: Use heavily for tech accents, labels, metric numbers, overlines, and terminal UI elements. Uppercase with tracking-widest for overlines.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tighter leading-none text-white

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: MODE A: 'Tetris' Grid for feature showcases. Asymmetric layouts with gap-8 to gap-12. Avoid simple symmetric columns.

motion_and_interactions.global_scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling recommended for premium momentum feel.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements should have sharp transitions, e.g., 1px cyan border glow on hover, or mono text revealing via scramble effect.
motion_and_interactions.reveal_pattern: Staggered fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> 1) on scroll for all major text blocks and grid items.

buttons.primary: bg-cyan-500 hover:bg-cyan-400 text-black font-semibold rounded-none px-6 py-3 transition-colors flex items-center gap-2
buttons.outline: border border-zinc-700 hover:border-cyan-500 text-white bg-transparent rounded-none px-6 py-3 transition-all flex items-center gap-2 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wider

cards.base: bg-zinc-950/50 border border-zinc-800 rounded-none p-8 relative overflow-hidden
cards.hover_effect: The 'Tracing Beam' - On hover, introduce a subtle cyan gradient background shift or a border color transition to cyan-500/50.

page_sections.name: Navigation
page_sections.spec: Sticky top (z-50) with backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60. Sharp bottom border (border-b border-zinc-800). Left: DeployHub Logo (mono font, cyan accent). Right: Log in, 'Deploy Now' primary button.

page_sections.name: Hero
page_sections.spec: Massive top padding (pt-40 pb-24). Central alignment. H1: 'Deploy anything. Faster. Greener.' (Outfit, text-6xl+). Subtitle: 'The all-in-one PaaS built for agencies and modern developers. Zero configuration, 100% white-label, EU-hosted.' Visual: A split terminal window and ConstellationCanvas background. Terminal shows a simulated build log (useTypewriter hook) deploying an app. Two CTAs: Primary 'Start deploying', Secondary 'View pricing'.

page_sections.name: How It Works (Process Flow)
page_sections.spec: Grid layout. 3 Steps: 1. Connect GitHub, 2. Auto-Detect Stack (Nixpacks), 3. Live URL + Metrics. Use horizontal connecting lines with glowing animated SVG dashes (simulating data transfer). Each step features a mono overline and a small looping UI animation.

page_sections.name: Features Showcase (The Real Deal)
page_sections.spec: Bento Grid (Tetris layout). Card 1 (Large): 'Live Container Metrics' - display a Recharts line graph drawing itself on scroll. Card 2 (Medium): 'Google PageSpeed Insights' - Circular gauge spinning up to 99 on render. Card 3 (Medium): 'Cookieless Analytics' - minimalist bar chart or visitor dot map. Card 4: 'Multi-tenant Workspaces' - UI mockup of agency dashboard switcher. Use images from the API to texture the backgrounds behind data.

page_sections.name: Comparison Table
page_sections.spec: Section titled 'Why DeployHub?'. A sharp, border-collapse table comparing DeployHub, Vercel, Render, and DIY (Coolify). Rows: 'Data Residency', 'Monitoring Included', 'White-label', 'Green Energy', 'Agency Pricing'. DeployHub column has a cyan-950 background with a cyan border. Use Lucide check (cyan) and x (zinc-600) icons.

page_sections.name: Green Energy USP (Spotlight)
page_sections.spec: Dramatic dark section. Background image: 'wind turbine night' (overlay bg-black/80). Massive green-cyan typography: '100% Wind & Solar Powered'. Subtext: 'Your apps run in Climate-Neutral EU datacenters by default.' Add floating leaf or wind particles using Framer Motion or simple CSS animations.

page_sections.name: Roadmap Teaser
page_sections.spec: Horizontal scrolling or simple grid of 'Coming Soon' features (Database branching, Native heatmaps, AI Co-pilot, White-label PDF reports). Style as locked terminal files (opacity-50, dashed borders).

page_sections.name: Social Proof Ticker & CTA
page_sections.spec: React-fast-marquee showing stats: '1.2M DEPLOYS / 99.99% UPTIME / 47ms AVG LATENCY'. Followed by a massive, centered CTA section: 'Stop managing infrastructure. Start building.' Primary button.

page_sections.name: Footer
page_sections.spec: Dark minimal footer. Include an 'EU Hosted & GDPR Ready' badge and a 'Green Energy' badge. 4-column layout for links. border-t border-zinc-800.

green_energy_bg.description: Silhouette of a wind turbine at night. Use as a heavily darkened background overlay for the Green Energy USP section.

server_abstract.description: Abstract server wires. Use inside feature cards as a subtle background texture (opacity 10-20%).

eu_map_abstract.description: Abstract map texture. Use in the Data Residency / Privacy section.

icons.rules: Use stroke-width 1.5. No fill colors unless specifically emphasizing a primary state. For tech features, use icons like Terminal, Activity, Zap, Shield, Server, Globe.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, links, roadmap cards) must have a kebab-case data-testid attribute based on role (e.g., 'hero-deploy-btn', 'nav-login-link').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the JSON structure and CSS variable mappings provided.
Do NOT use rounded corners; the aesthetic is strict 'rounded-none' for a terminal/brutalist feel.
Implement Framer Motion for scroll reveals, staggered bento cards, and the mock-UI graphs.
Do NOT use real video files (.mp4). Simulate the 'How it works' and feature demos using CSS keyframes, SVG paths, or Recharts data-viz components wrapped in Framer Motion.
Make sure the 'Green Energy' section stands out emotionally, pairing the wind turbine image with an emerald/cyan overlay.
Build the comparison table without Shadcn 'Card' wrappers; use semantic HTML table elements or CSS Grid with explicit border utilities to maintain the brutalist skeleton look.
